response.justification: Candidate has ~15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and engineering leadership at scale — none of which are evident. The resume shows senior/staff IC contributions but no principal-level strategic influence, no shipped AI products, no cloud-platform architecture leadership, and only a brief, recent mention of AI-adjacent work.
strengths: ~15 years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source maintainership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized expertise at the depth a Principal AI strategy role requires
No evidence of Director-level influence, org-wide technical leadership, or advising strategic customers
Cloud experience is limited (AWS CDK mention only); no platform-scale cloud architecture track record

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI product/platform expertise
